pages.text:
22 NOV. 1999

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND

FOREIGN TRADE

1 CULLODEN ROAD,

ST. MICHAEL,

BARBADOS

Date: November 15, 1999

No. 160 Vol. Ili number and date of this letter should be quoled.

Director General

Office of International des Epizooties 12 Ruedeprony 75017

Paris

FRANCE

Dear Sir:

I have the honour to advise you that Barbados decides to become a member of the

Office International des Epizooties.

lhe Grovernment of Barbados has examined the provisions of the International

Agreement and of the Internal Statutes of 25 January 1924 and agrees to participate in the working costs of the Office under the conditions stated, especially with regard to Article three

(3) of the International Agreement and Article eleven (11) of the Internal Statutes.

The 6" contribution category has been selected by the Govemment of Barbados

The official Delegate of Barbados to the OIE will be the Senior Veterinary

Officer.

Yours faithfully

stabbers

Matthew Wilson for Permanent Secretary (ag)

similar_documents.title: Courrier relatif aux contributions à l'OIE
